panels.description: Total time spent per method = rate of the duration histogram _sum, in seconds of work per second (wall-clock per call, incl. DB/lock waits; not CPU profiling).
panels.title: Where your time goes (s/s per method)

panels.description: Per-method volume, time cost, latency shape and error rate. Sort any column.
panels.title: Method detail

panels.description: Share of calls by how they target a block. Pinned share (by_number + by_hash) is the archive-pressure signal.
panels.title: Hot-path vs archive (by block_target)

panels.description: Failed calls by method and error_kind. block_not_found spikes corroborate the archive panel.
panels.title: Errors by method & kind

panels.description: Share of calls by RPC spec version. Deprecation signal.
panels.title: RPC version usage
